html:
Exclusive to:

The Lightning Conductor is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Seafaring Filter and requires 5 Gold Nuggets to craft, and a Think Tank to prototype.

The Lightning Conductor can be deployed on a Mast or Winged Sail. The equipped mast acts as a Lightning Rod, diverting lightning with the same protection radius and emitting light when charged (though WX-78 cannot charge from it). It is mutually exclusive with (i.e. cannot be used at the same time as) a Deck Illuminator.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Serpentine Storm Eater skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch starting from March 24, 2022 to April 7, 2022.
Loyal
Nautical Collection
Serpentine Storm Eater
This sea monster has an appetite for electricity.

Trivia

  • The Lightning Conductor was introduced in the Troubled Waters update.

Gallery

  • Base and top of a built Lightning Conductor.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Lightning protection when atop a Mast.
Does not stack

“I've harnessed the power of electricity over land and sea!”
–Wilson
“That's where the lightning goes.”
–Willow
“Is lightning trap.”
–Wolfgang
“Alas, being struck down by lightning is one less thing I can look forward too.”
–Wendy
“POWER STORAGE”
–WX-78
“A very sensible safety measure.”
–Wickerbottom
“Pretty nifty, eh?”
–Woodie
“Very prudent.”
–Maxwell
“Yöu may dö yöur wörst, öh mighty Thör!”
–Wigfrid
“We feel safer already!”
–Webber
“It will be sizzling with electricity in no time.”
–Warly
“Zzzzt catcher”
–Wormwood
“Seems pretty practical.”
–Winona
“Now mayhaps, we won't get zapped!”
–Wortox
“Lightning catcher!”
–Wurt
“The static makes Woby's fur all poofy.”
–Walter
“That seems wise.”
–Wanda
The Lightning Conductor is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Seafaring Filter and requires 5 Gold Nuggets to craft, and a Think Tank to prototype.
The Lightning Conductor can be deployed on a Mast or Winged Sail. The equipped mast acts as a Lightning Rod, diverting lightning with the same protection radius and emitting light when charged (though WX-78 cannot charge from it). It is mutually exclusive with (i.e. cannot be used at the same time as) a Deck Illuminator.

It is found in the [[Seafaring Filter]] and requires 5 [[Gold Nugget]]s to craft, and a [[Think Tank]] to prototype. The Lightning Conductor can be deployed on a [[Mast]] or [[Winged Sail]]. The equipped mast acts as a [[Lightning Rod]], diverting lightning with the same protection radius and emitting light when charged (though [[WX-78]] cannot charge from it). It is mutually exclusive with (i.e. cannot be used at the same time as) a [[Deck Illuminator]]. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Other Items Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Serpentine Storm Eater''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch starting from March 24, 2022 to April 7, 2022.
